description: Cooking classes, food tours, unique dining experiences, and baking adventures.

ideas.title: Couples Pasta-Making Class
ideas.description: Book a hands-on cooking class where you both learn to make fresh pasta from scratch — from kneading the dough to cutting tagliatelle. Most classes end with a candlelit dinner of what you just made, paired with wine. The tactile, floury teamwork is surprisingly romantic.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: foodie_01] Two cartoon characters in chef aprons at a wooden kitchen table, flour-dusted and grinning, pulling long strands of fresh homemade pasta together. A pasta drying rack hangs behind them, wine glasses sit nearby, and warm candlelight fills the kitchen. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Neighborhood Food Tour
ideas.description: Map out 4–5 local restaurants, food trucks, or bakeries in a walkable neighborhood and sample a signature dish at each stop. Give each place a rating out of 10 and debate your favorites as you go. This works best in areas with diverse cuisines packed close together.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: foodie_02] Two cartoon characters strolling along a colorful street food district, each holding a different dish from a different restaurant — dumplings, a taco, a skewer. Rating scorecards dangle from their hands as they debate their favorites mid-bite. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Korean BBQ Grill-Your-Own Night
ideas.description: Book a table at a Korean BBQ restaurant where grills are built into every table. You cook marinated meats together, share sides, and sip traditional drinks while servers guide you through the process. The interactive format breaks the usual dinner-date script completely.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: foodie_03] Two cartoon characters seated at a Korean BBQ restaurant table with a glowing built-in grill, tongs in hand, laughing as sizzling marinated meats cook between them. A dozen colorful banchan side dishes surround the grill in small ceramic bowls. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Mystery Ingredient Cook-Off
ideas.description: Each person secretly selects three surprise ingredients at the grocery store without the other seeing. Back home, reveal the ingredients and both attempt to cook a dish incorporating all three. Score each other on creativity, taste, and presentation, then eat your creations together.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: foodie_04] Two cartoon characters standing in a kitchen holding up three absurdly mismatched mystery ingredients each — anchovy paste, gummy bears, a whole beetroot — with wide shocked eyes. Pots bubble on the stove and recipe scraps litter the counter. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Sushi Rolling Workshop
ideas.description: Sign up for a beginner sushi rolling class and learn to make classic rolls from rice preparation to the final cut. It's hands-on, technical enough to be engaging, and the result is a full meal you both made together. Many studios are BYOB, making it even more fun.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: foodie_05] Two cartoon characters at a sushi rolling class, bamboo mats spread before them, carefully assembling colorful rolls with concentrated tongue-out expressions. An instructor gestures in the background and a lineup of colorful ingredient bowls fills the counter. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: DIY Wine or Craft Beer Tasting
ideas.description: Pick up 4–5 bottles of wine or cans of craft beer from different regions, print out simple tasting scorecards, and host your own blind tasting at home. Cover the labels, pour, sip, and guess. The friendly competition and inevitable wrong guesses make for a hilarious evening.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: foodie_06] Two cartoon characters at a home table, holding wine glasses up to warm lamplight and squinting at the color like wine detectives. All bottle labels are covered in black paper and printed tasting scorecards, pens, and a charcuterie board sit between them. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Beignet or Croissant Baking Date
ideas.description: Choose a challenging pastry recipe — beignets, croissants, or hand-pulled noodles — and tackle it together from scratch. The process is long enough to spark real conversation and the inevitable mess and failures make for great shared memories. Finish the night eating everything you made.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: foodie_07] Two cartoon characters emerging from a kitchen absolutely covered in powdered sugar — on their faces, hair, and aprons — holding a tray of golden beignets. The kitchen is cheerfully chaotic with flour clouds and scattered baking tools everywhere. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Cocktail Masterclass for Two
ideas.description: Book a couples cocktail class at a local bar or spirits school where you learn to shake, stir, and garnish two or three classic cocktails. You'll leave with a new skill, a recipe card, and a fun signature drink to recreate on future date nights at home.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: foodie_08] Two cartoon characters behind a bar counter, both shaking cocktail shakers with dramatic flair — one with arms raised, the other spinning theirs. Citrus wheels, fresh herbs, and colorful garnishes are artfully arranged in front of them. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Themed Dinner Night
ideas.description: Pick a cuisine neither of you has cooked before — Ethiopian, Peruvian, Georgian — and spend the afternoon researching recipes, shopping for unfamiliar ingredients, and cooking a multi-course meal together. Set the table with decorations matching the country and play that nation's music while eating.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: foodie_09] Two cartoon characters in a kitchen decorated with colorful international flags and cultural motifs, cooking unfamiliar dishes from an open cookbook. The table is set with that country's traditional decorations and music notes drift from a speaker on the shelf. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Chef's Table or Tasting Menu Dinner
ideas.description: Reserve two seats at a local restaurant's chef's table or order the full tasting menu for a multi-course culinary journey. Watch dishes arrive and discuss each one — the flavors, the plating, what works and what doesn't. It turns dinner into a shared sensory experience rather than just a meal.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: foodie_10] Two cartoon characters seated at an elegant chef's table inside a glowing restaurant kitchen, watching a white-jacketed chef place the finishing touch on an intricately plated dish. Crystal wine glasses gleam under warm professional spotlights. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading.
